// Template: handler.rs.txt
// Generation time: {{ generation_time | default("Unknown") }}

use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use brrtrouter::typed::TypedHandlerRequest;
use anyhow::anyhow;
{% for import in imports -%}
use crate::handlers::types::{{ import }};
{% endfor %}

{% block request_struct %}
/// Request structure for {{ handler_name }} handler
/// 
/// This structure represents the complete request parameters and body
/// as defined in the OpenAPI specification.
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Serialize)]
pub struct Request {
    {% for field in request_fields -%}
    {% if field.documentation %}/// {{ field.documentation }}{% endif %}
    {% if field.validation_attrs %}{{ field.validation_attrs }}{% endif %}
    {% if field.optional %}#[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]{% endif %}
    pub {{ field.name }}: {% if field.optional %}Option<{{ field.ty }}>{% else %}{{ field.ty }}{% endif %},
    {% endfor -%}
}
{% endblock request_struct %}

{% block response_struct %}
/// Response structure for {{ handler_name }} handler
/// 
/// This structure represents the response format as defined
/// in the OpenAPI specification.
#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
{% if sse %}
pub struct Response(pub String);
{% elif response_is_array %}
pub struct Response(pub {{ response_array_type }});
{% else %}
pub struct Response {
    {% for field in response_fields -%}
    {% if field.documentation %}/// {{ field.documentation }}{% endif %}
    {% if field.optional %}#[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]{% endif %}
    pub {{ field.name }}: {% if field.optional %}Option<{{ field.ty }}>{% else %}{{ field.ty }}{% endif %},
    {% endfor -%}
}
{% endif %}
{% endblock response_struct %}

{% block parameter_extraction %}
{% include "components/parameter_extraction.rs.txt" %}
{% endblock parameter_extraction %}

{% block handler_function %}
/// Main handler function that delegates to the controller
/// 
/// This function is called by the BRRTRouter dispatcher and handles
/// the conversion between the raw request and the typed request structure.
pub fn handler(req: TypedHandlerRequest<Request>) -> Response {
    match crate::controllers::{{ handler_name }}::handle(req) {
        Ok(response) => response,
        Err(validation_error) => {
            // In a real application, you might want to log this error
            // and return a proper error response instead of panicking
            panic!("Controller validation error: {:?}", validation_error);
        }
    }
}
{% endblock handler_function %}
